Man Tax: Andre Hamann “That's the problem with drinking, I thought, as I poured myself a drink. If something bad happens you drink in an attempt to forget; if something good happens you drink in order to celebrate; and if nothing happens you drink to make something happen.” ― Charles Bukowski

item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

item.title: Soda Cake Thing
item.description:
Alright, so a week or so ago there was a dump with this image in it, and I was like "DOES THIS WORK?" And I was bored today, so let's find out. TL;DR: It's actually really tasty!
Ingredients: Lemon cake mix. Sprite.
Mix angrily.
Pour into two cake pans. In retrospect, one was probably a better option. GREASE THE PAN. I did not. This was a mistake.
Baked! Still looks successful.
As I mentioned, I didn't grease the pans OR wait for them to cool long enough. I just sent it.
So now they're about half as tall.
I had a solution. Just scrape the bottom out and throw it on top! Genius? Anyhow, I used some leftover cream cheese icing I had from a carrot cake. I added some lemon juice. Recipe not included because the cream cheese icing wasn't good the first time.
Iced!
I...enlisted @nincompoopie's help to move the top onto the icing half. This failed MISERABLY.
It's a ... deconstructed lemon cake? ANYHOW. Verdict: it's actually really tasty! Just don't fuck the entire process up and I bet it'd be awesome.
item.dc:creator: PeaceOnEarthGoodPornToMen

item.title: These assholes
item.description:
Daniel Graham and Adam Carruthers were both found guilty of two counts of criminal damage after videos
The Sycamore Gap tree, which once stood in a dip next to Hadrian's Wall in Northumberland, is England’s most famous, and most photographed tree.
The tree was about 200 years old
It featured in the 1991 movie Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves starring Kevin Costner, Alan Rickman, Morgan Freeman and Christian Slater.
It was a great tourist attraction, for obvious reasons
On the morning of 28 September 2023, news spread that the tree had been chopped down overnight. Under the cover of darkness, Graham and Carrithers trekked across marshland in winds of up to 60mph and used their experience to mark the trunk, cut a wedge out of it so they knew which direction it would fall and then cut it down with a chainsaw. They filmed it and watched the sycamore crashing to the ground. What they didn't realise is that the phone and vehicle they used would be tracked and the conversations they had would be discovered. As the police questioning began, their stories unravelled and so did their friendship. Graham's phone was used to film the felling. Road and CCTV cameras captured his Range Rover going to and from Steel Rigg, the nearest public car park to the tree. He told the court his car and phone were used by other people, including Adam Carruthers "who didn't need to ask".
These cowards plead not guilty and basically blamed each other for it. A video found on Daniel Graham’s phone…that I wish I had not watched; showed the moment that these idiots felled the tree, for absolutely no reason at all.
Utter cowards, too ashamed to even show their faces on their way into court. They haven’t been sentenced yet, but are likely to get 10 years each. Well done assholes, you ruined your lives and a historic monument for absolutely no reason at all.
item.dc:creator: I0VE525P00GE

item.title: Mermay day 9, Banana eel! [OC]
item.description:
My first eel of the season!! I love drawing eels so much, definitely plan on making more soon ;D
And day 9 already- doesn’t time fly! Thankfully we now have a banana (eel) for scale ;D If you like my stuff and want to see more, come support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives

item.title: What Happened Today #99
item.description: While many were planning Mother's Day brunches, Trump's team is planning to dismantle constitutional protections. A federal judge blocked his sweeping government overhaul for 14 days, while sources revealed discussions in the White House with him about suspending habeas corpus—the 800-year-old protection against imprisonment without trial. Censorship is also increasing. The White House says it fired the nation's first black Librarian of Congress because she acquired books that were DEI-related and not child friendly, but her job literally mandates collecting a copy of each copyrighted book. The Pentagon continued its censorship efforts by demanding that military libraries remove books about diversity, equity, and inclusion by May 21. You need to be taking action about this right now. Today. Go to Mobilize and find out where you can start making your voice heard. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-halts-cuts 2. https://go.govbrief.today/merz-zero-tariffs 3. https://go.govbrief.today/afrikaner-migrants-arriving 4. https://go.govbrief.today/lower-china-tariff 5. https://go.govbrief.today/bessent-debt-ceiling 6. https://go.govbrief.today/millions-lost-trump-crypto 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fires-safety-commission-members 8. https://go.govbrief.today/nsf-equity-division 9. https://go.govbrief.today/states-energy-emergency 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-overturn-efficiency-rules 11. https://go.govbrief.today/military-censor-books 12. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-arrests-mayor 13. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-habeas-corpus 14. https://go.govbrief.today/dallas-muslim-development-investigated 15. https://go.govbrief.today/ed-marting-doj-job 16. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-adams-thanks 17. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-richardson-staff-call 18. https://go.govbrief.today/ozturk-released 19. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-moves-detainees-texas 20. https://go.govbrief.today/new-newark-outage 21. https://go.govbrief.today/librarian-fired-dei 22. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-foreign-land 23. https://go.govbrief.today/mexico-sues-google-gulf 24. https://go.govbrief.today/crowd-blocks-ice-arrest

We ain't found sh!t
Made me giggle

Contagious laughter
These 2 dudes can get it

item.title: OG Yolo

item.title: Jalapeño a Day Until he gets Adopted
item.description:
Found this spicy nugget with three siblings abandoned in a crate near an apartment complex. His brother and sisters have all found wonderful homes, but my limited network has not found a match for my final ward. And none of the shelters will take a healthy kitten that's over 6 weeks.
He is an absolute cutie, purrs almost constantly, and loves people. He's playful and loves being kissed and pet!
Lap time is the best time, he's great at following you around, and would make a great best friend. Maybe even become an adventure cat as he likes the outside but won't leave your side.
If you are in the Portland, OR area and looking for your furever friend, hit me up. He has been to the vet, has gotten his first shots, and is in mint condition.
item.dc:creator: EvilPirateMcKinley
